parts.text: LeBron James is an iconic basketball superstar, widely regarded as one of the greatest players in NBA history due to his unparalleled versatility and leadership. He has led multiple teams to championship titles, earning numerous MVP awards and shattering countless records throughout his illustrious career. Beyond the court, James is a successful businessman and philanthropist, making a significant impact through initiatives like the "I PROMISE" school and various community endeavors.

parts.text: On December 3, 1984, a catastrophic gas leak at the Union Carbide pesticide plant in Bhopal, India, released highly toxic methyl isocyanate into the atmosphere. This industrial disaster immediately killed thousands and caused long-term health problems for hundreds of thousands more, becoming one of the world's worst industrial accidents and highlighting issues of corporate accountability and environmental safety.

parts.text:
# Year: 1984

## Famous Person Bio:

LeBron James is an iconic basketball superstar, widely regarded as one of the greatest players in NBA history due to his unparalleled versatility and leadership. He has led multiple teams to championship titles, earning numerous MVP awards and shattering countless records throughout his illustrious career. Beyond the court, James is a successful businessman and philanthropist, making a significant impact through initiatives like the "I PROMISE" school and various community endeavors.

## Historical Event:

On December 3, 1984, a catastrophic gas leak at the Union Carbide pesticide plant in Bhopal, India, released highly toxic methyl isocyanate into the atmosphere. This industrial disaster immediately killed thousands and caused long-term health problems for hundreds of thousands more, becoming one of the world's worst industrial accidents and highlighting issues of corporate accountability and environmental safety.
